## ScreenShotPP v0.1.2

This release adds built-in automatic updates so ScreenShotPP can keep itself current.

### Highlights

- New **Check for updates** button in Settings, with download progress and automatic restart
- Updates are cryptographically signed and verified before installation
- Lays the groundwork for future in-app updates — installs from this version onward can update themselves

### macOS

Download the `.dmg`, drag ScreenShotPP into `Applications`, then grant Screen Recording
permission on first launch.

### Windows preview

Download and run the NSIS `.exe` installer. The Windows installer is not code-signed yet,
so Microsoft SmartScreen may display a warning. Verify that your download comes from this
GitHub repository, then choose **More info** → **Run anyway**.
